name: Birdies Indoor Golf & Bar
about: Birdies Indoor Golf & Bar is a family-owned and operated indoor golf simulator business that provides a friendly 'clubhouse' atmosphere with six state-of-the-art simulators. The venue offers year-round golf experiences and a full bar, catering to a mix of casual players, families, and groups. Customers can rent simulators by the hour, play on over 70 courses, or participate in leagues and events, with the facility emphasizing a welcoming environment for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Six state-of-the-art simulators with realistic ball-tracking technology
Over 70 world-renowned courses available to play
Friendly clubhouse atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Multi-sport simulators for variety beyond golf
Flexible booking options and league opportunities

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food menu accessible via PDF

simulator_hardware.notes: Six state-of-the-art simulators with Dual Tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has a full kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole game takes approximately one hour per player, with a minimum of 4 hours recommended for a foursome.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Birdies Indoor Golf & Bar welcomes all ages and families, making it suitable for children.
